fix: make Pusher broadcasts non-blocking \(fire-and-forget\)

Unconfigured Pusher keys caused 500 errors on all game API routes.
Broadcasts now use .catch\(\(\) => null\) so missing Pusher config
never breaks core functionality \(status updates, scoring, GPS\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push 2>&1)

Bash(cd D:/apps/impacttour && git add src/lib/pusher/client.ts src/hooks/use-pusher-channel.ts .env.local && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: guard Pusher client against missing env vars \(React 19 effect errors\)

- getPusherClient\(\) returns null instead of throwing when NEXT_PUBLIC_PUSHER_KEY
  or NEXT_PUBLIC_PUSHER_CLUSTER are not set
- usePusherChannel falls back to polling-only mode when Pusher is null
- useSpelleiderChannel skips silently when Pusher is null
- Add Pusher credentials to .env.local \(app_id 2119175, cluster eu\)

Root cause: React 19 now routes synchronous errors thrown in useEffect to
the nearest error boundary \(changed from React 18 which only logged them\).
Missing NEXT_PUBLIC_PUSHER_KEY caused PusherClient constructor to throw,
triggering the game error boundary \("Game fout opgetreden"\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" 2>&1)

Bash(cd D:/apps/impacttour && git add src/lib/pusher/client.ts src/hooks/use-pusher-channel.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: guard Pusher client against missing env vars \(React 19 effect errors\)

  or NEXT_PUBLIC_PUSHER_CLUSTER are not set
- usePusherChannel falls back to polling-only mode when Pusher is null
- useSpelleiderChannel skips silently when Pusher is null

Root cause: React 19 now routes synchronous errors thrown in useEffect to
the nearest error boundary. Missing NEXT_PUBLIC_PUSHER_KEY caused PusherClient
constructor to throw, triggering "Game fout opgetreden" error boundary.
Pusher credentials added to Vercel via CLI \(app_id 2119175, cluster eu\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" 2>&1)
